zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick於大約1334年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡里克時，她的父親Alexander Bruce 1st and last Earl of Carrick24歲，母親Eleanor Douglas18歲。她於從0149年到1368年與William Cunningham Earl of Carrick在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1368年6月22日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯享年35歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick于大约1334年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾卡里克时，她的父亲Alexander Bruce 1st and last Earl of Carrick24岁，母亲Eleanor Douglas18岁。她于从0149年到1368年与William Cunningham Earl of Carrick在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1368年6月22日在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯享年35岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾莫爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Bruce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from a place in Normandy, probably from Brix (La Manche).

History: The son of the Domesday baron, a friend of David I of Scotland, was granted by him the Lordship of Annandale in 1124, and his second son Robert became the founder of the Scottish house of Bruce. — This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with its original form Brousse in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Brousse
meanings: French: topographic name for someone living in a scrubby area, from Old French bro(u)ce ‘thicket, brushwood’ (from Late Latin bruscia), or a habitational name from any of several places in France named Brousse. Compare Bruce and Brusse .

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its altered form Bruce) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Brewis
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Briouze in Orne.
(Northumberland and Durham): topographic name or nickname from Middle English breuhous ‘brewery’ (literally ‘brew house’).

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick was born about 1334, in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Alexander Bruce 1st and last Earl of Carrick, was 24 and her mother, Eleanor Douglas, was 18. She married William Cunningham Earl of Carrick from 0149 to 1368, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 22 June 1368, in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 35, and was buried in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick est née environ 1334, à Carrick, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Bruce 1st and last Earl of Carrick, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Douglas, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé William Cunningham Earl of Carrick du 0149 au 1368, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 juin 1368, à Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick um 1334 in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Bruce 1st and last Earl of Carrick 24 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Douglas 18. Sie hat von 0149 bis 1368 in Scotland William Cunningham Earl of Carrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Juni 1368 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick è nata il circa 1334 nel Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander Bruce 1st and last Earl of Carrick, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Douglas, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato William Cunningham Earl of Carrick da 0149 a 1368, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 giugno 1368, nel Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrickが約1334年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアカーリックで生まれた時，父Alexander Bruce 1st and last Earl of Carrickは24歳，母Eleanor Douglasは18歳であった。から0149年まで1368年にスコットランドでWilliam Cunningham Earl of Carrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1368年6月22日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマアウルズで35歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマアウルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick(이)가 대략 1334년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 카릭에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Bruce 1st and last Earl of Carrick(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Douglas(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 0149년 부터 1368년 까지 스컷랜드에서 William Cunningham Earl of Carrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1368년 6월 22일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬모르스에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬모르스에 묻혔다.

mn.Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kin: Kilmaurs, Air, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick nasceu aproximadamente 1334, em Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Bruce 1st and last Earl of Carrick, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Douglas, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com William Cunningham Earl of Carrick de 0149 a 1368, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de junho de 1368, em Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick родилась около 1334 г. в местности каррикк, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Bruce 1st and last Earl of Carrick было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Douglas, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Cunningham Earl of Carrick с 0149 по 1368 в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 22 июня 1368 г. в местности килмаурс, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности килмаурс, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Eleanor Bruce Countess of Carrick nació aproximadamente 1334, en Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Bruce 1st and last Earl of Carrick, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Eleanor Douglas, tenía 18 años. Se casó con William Cunningham Earl of Carrick desde 0149 hasta 1368, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de junio de 1368, en Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Kilmaurs, Ayrshire, Scotland.
